description: This file contains Data Transfer Object (DTO) classes used by the officer-facing APIs in the Business Loan backend. It defines structured representations for application summaries, detailed views, decision override requests/responses, and audit event logs.

classes.name: OfficerDtos
classes.description: Container class for various DTO records related to officer API interactions.

classes.name: OfficerDtos.QueueItem
classes.description: DTO representing a summarized queue item for submitted applications.

classes.name: OfficerDtos.ApplicationDetail
classes.description: DTO providing detailed view of an individual application, including data payloads and status.

classes.name: OfficerDtos.DecisionOverrideRequest
classes.description: DTO for requesting an override of an automated decision, including the decision and justification.

classes.name: OfficerDtos.DecisionOverrideResponse
classes.description: DTO for the response after applying a decision override, including previous and new decision details.

classes.name: OfficerDtos.AuditEventResponse
classes.description: DTO representing an audit log event for operational and security tracking.
